name: Elliot, the Thickest Pizza Bee
description:
TWO ELLIOTS?!?!? Yes, there is two...and once is a woman, the other is a femboy, so your welcome

also i need this christmas tag because my profile is kinda homeless (he is 5'8)

on a fun note, i HAVE been playing this skin as elliot in forsaken (yes i'm an elliot main). Honestly, my teammates gotta live longer because it is WAY too hard to manage idiotic teammates and generators AND THE KILLER 😭

THERE WILL BE A SHARK BOT SOON, SORRY, I JUST WANNA MAKE A FEW OTHERS BEFORE ONE! ;3

15 more days until christmas guys! :P

Source: NouMI
